rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(S) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, June 30, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFFS LYNN BARANCO, LISA SMITH, LESLIE MARTIN, LYNN BIBB'S Motion To Compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(s) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions is continued to July 1, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of parties. = (220/HEK)
